message:
fix(vdbe): correct If/IfNot NULL semantics and HAVING filter NULL handling

Fix SQLite-conformant NULL handling in conditional jump opcodes:

engine.rs:
- If opcode: When P1 is NULL, jump iff P3 != 0 (was: never jump on NULL).
- IfNot opcode: When P1 is NULL, jump iff P3 != 0 (was: always jump on
  NULL). This matches SQLite's documented P3 semantics where P3 controls
  the NULL behavior independently of the truthiness test.

codegen.rs:
- HAVING filter: Set P3=1 on IfNot emission so that NULL HAVING
  expressions skip the row (jump), matching SQLite semantics where
  NULL HAVING is treated as false.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
